rationale: Performs the exact text-rename described in the PR body across all 11 files listed. `Jarred Gou` shifts from `Chief Product Officer` / `Chief Product Officer (CPO)` / `CPO` to `Head of Product` in `01-company-overview--{company-overview,executive-one-pager,fundraising-memo}.md`, `02-pitch-deck--pitch-deck.md`, `04-technical-architecture--architecture-vision-memo.md`, `06-team--founder-bio-stephan-claxton.md` (heading and body), `07-traction--execution-velocity.md`, `08-legal--ip-assignment-index.md`, `10-appendix--investor-qa.md` (two occurrences), and `src/data/sections.ts` blurb. `Colin Zhang` shifts from `Software Engineer` / `Senior Software Engineer` to `Lead Backend Engineer` in the same set of files. `06-team--hiring-plan.md` reconciles the prior `A head of product comes post-Series A` line into `A second product hire comes post-Series A`, preventing the contradiction the PR body flags. Pure docs/content rename with no code or test changes.
